title: Darkk's Magnificient Dark GUI
description: Multi-purpose Minecraft resource pack editing multiple vanilla and modded elements for a revamped look on all things visual! This is a must-have dark mode resource pack for modded MC!
body:
![Header](https://i.imgur.com/AY7bhLO.png)

DMDG is in essence a dark mode pack, however it is much more than that. This originally started out as a resource pack for the MC: Unknown modpacks, but it became much more than that. We are always trying to improve and add more features and support more mods. We hope you enjoy!

Current Features

**🌟Exclusive Dark Mode (minimalistic and clean)🌟** **🌟Custom Containers (new GUI for all crafting menus)🌟**

Planned Features

🌟Redesigned Hot Bar (reimagined design to modernize the standard hotbar)🌟 🌟New Survival Mechanics Design (new look for food, armor, health, etc.)🌟
